title: populus × serotina var. erecta
intro: Populus × serotina var. erecta, also known as Black Cottonwood, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the poplar family. The medicinal properties of Black Cottonwood include its bark, which has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Black Cottonwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of Black Cottonwood include infusions, decoctions, and salves made from its bark, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
